name_en: !!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Original Leather Miu Women's Nappa Sheepskin Handbag, inspired by classic designs, the structure has been adjusted to be lighter, bringing a new personality, creating a classic piece with eternal charm. Embossed letter logo, adding a signature element 👝 Comes with a handle, suitable as a handbag or shoulder bag! Removable charm, vintage gold hardware, front embossed letter logo, lined, with zip pocket and slip pocket!
